uplink.description: Status report, both probes dry (no leak): water.leak false (report type 0x01)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input (deviceType 0x46 = 70 = R718WA2). Expected.data from running reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 3.6, WaterLeak_1 NoLeak, WaterLeak_2 NoLeak); both probes dry -> water.leak false.

uplink.description: Status report, probe 1 wet (leak detected): water.leak true via probe 1 (report type 0x01)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input (byte4 = 1). Expected.data from running reference/upstream-codec.js (WaterLeak_1 Leak, WaterLeak_2 NoLeak); water.leak = leak1 || leak2 = true.

uplink.description: Status report, probe 2 wet (leak detected): water.leak true via probe 2 (report type 0x01)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input (byte5 = 1). Expected.data from running reference/upstream-codec.js (WaterLeak_1 NoLeak, WaterLeak_2 Leak); water.leak = leak1 || leak2 = true.

uplink.description: Status report, both probes wet (leak detected): water.leak true (report type 0x01)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input (byte4 = byte5 = 1). Expected.data from running reference/upstream-codec.js (WaterLeak_1 Leak, WaterLeak_2 Leak); water.leak true.

uplink.description: Low-battery flag set (high bit of voltage byte) surfaces lowBattery extra
uplink._note: Synthetic input: byte3 = 0x80 | 36 = 164. Upstream emits Volt '3.6(low battery)'; normalized to battery 3.6 + lowBattery true extra.

uplink.description: Device-info / startup frame carries no measurement (report type 0x00)
uplink._note: TTN example input (report type 0x00). Upstream returns device/version/datecode metadata; we report no measurement.

uplink.description: Config response on fPort 7 is unsupported
uplink._note: TTN example input (ConfigReportRsp on fPort 7). Config frames carry no measurement; we report unsupported fPort.
